final_decision.exact_quote: 7. In the confirmation dialog, click Delete Team. A success message appears.
final_decision.justification: [ACTION_REQUEST] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.90; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=HackerRank for Work->community; exact_quote_source=deterministic_fallback
final_decision.response:
To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you need to delete the team they are part of. Here are the step-by-step instructions to delete a team:

1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials.

2. Select your profile icon in the upper-right corner.

3. Select Teams Management from the drop-down menu.

4. Go to the Teams tab.

5. Select the team you want to delete.

6. Click the delete icon.

7. In the confirmation dialog, click Delete Team. A success message appears.
